title: Is The Sun Setting On Russias Crude Exports To India
section_path: Is The Sun Setting On Russias Crude Exports To India
section_path_text: Is The Sun Setting On Russias Crude Exports To India
summary:
Main
India's refiners are pivoting from Russian crude towards their traditional Middle Eastern crude diet, as Russia's crude exports are facing growing headwinds. By Serena Huang
Over the past two years, Russia has rapidly risen up the ranks to establish itself as the largest crude supplier to India, displacing Iraq as the long-standing top exporter. At its peak in May 2023, Russian crude accounted for over 40% of India's crude imports.
